fields.name: Why isn't my game showing up in Checkpoint?
fields.value:
There could be a few reasons.
1. Make sure you have save data in the game. Checkpoint requires a save archive to locate a game.
2. The game might save solely in ExtData. Press `X` and make sure it's not showing up there.
3. Reload your titles by holding `B`. If you loaded Checkpoint before saving in game, you'll need to do this as Checkpoint doesn't check titles at each launch.

fields.name: Why am I having issues using Checkpoint under applet mode?
fields.value: Applet mode isn't supported, as it doesn't give enough memory. Use Atmosphere's title takeover feature (launch game holding R) instead.

fields.name: Why can I no longer manage cheats?
fields.value: Cheat management was removed with v4.0 of Checkpoint. Please refer to [the Sharkive README](https://github.com/FlagBrew/sharkive#how-do-i-use-these-cheats) on how to manage Sharkive-based cheats going forward.
